title: TheatreSports™ by Improv Lore
excerpt: We’re kicking off our improvathon with TheatreSports! The show where improvisers show up to battle it out for the win. Four teams take on a series of fast, unpredictable challenges, building scenes…
first_para: We’re kicking off our improvathon with TheatreSports! The show where improvisers show up to battle it out for the win. Four teams take on a series of fast, unpredictable challenges, building scenes from nothing and pushing each other to go further every time. There are judges, there are rules, and the whole show moves with an intensity that’s perfect to start the day with. Expect controlled chaos, collaborative competitiveness, and caffeinated characters that will set the tone for the day! Who are Improv Lore? We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops. You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.
full_content:
1600×900 237 KB

We’re kicking off our improvathon with TheatreSports! The show where improvisers show up to battle it out for the win.
Four teams take on a series of fast, unpredictable challenges, building scenes from nothing and pushing each other to go further every time. There are judges, there are rules, and the whole show moves with an intensity that’s perfect to start the day with.
Expect controlled chaos, collaborative competitiveness, and caffeinated characters that will set the tone for the day!

Who are Improv Lore?

We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops.

You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.

title: Make Friends with the Stage: Open Stage Jam by Improv Lore
fancy title: Make Friends with the Stage: Open Stage Jam by Improv Lore
excerpt: The Open Stage Jam is where you get to step in and play, and try your hand at doing some improv on stage! We’ll set up simple scenes and scenarios, guide you, and keep things moving so you’re never…
first_para: The Open Stage Jam is where you get to step in and play, and try your hand at doing some improv on stage! We’ll set up simple scenes and scenarios, guide you, and keep things moving so you’re never left figuring it out on your own. You can jump in for a scene or two, try something new, and step back whenever you like. It’s a space that’s designed to be easy to enter, and built for taking small risks. You might come in just to watch, but we’re hoping you’ll leave having played. Who are Improv Lore? We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops. You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.
full_content:
1600×900 152 KB

The Open Stage Jam is where you get to step in and play, and try your hand at doing some improv on stage!

We’ll set up simple scenes and scenarios, guide you, and keep things moving so you’re never left figuring it out on your own. You can jump in for a scene or two, try something new, and step back whenever you like.

It’s a space that’s designed to be easy to enter, and built for taking small risks. You might come in just to watch, but we’re hoping you’ll leave having played.

Who are Improv Lore?

We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops.

You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.

title: Yes, And Dragons with Improv Lore
fancy title: Yes, And Dragons with Improv Lore
excerpt: What happens when a group of brave (and slightly clueless) adventurers set out on a quest… and the dice, and YOU decide their fate? This isn’t your usual D&D session. This is long-form improv meets…
first_para: What happens when a group of brave (and slightly clueless) adventurers set out on a quest… and the dice, and YOU decide their fate? This isn’t your usual D&D session. This is long-form improv meets chaotic fantasy: The audience creates the world, from the tavern to the Big Bad Evil Guy. Giant D20 rolls determine whether our heroes triumph or spectacularly fail. Plot twists? You can throw them in anytime. (Yes, you can make the wizard speak only in rhymes if you want.) Expect ridiculous characters, epic fails, and critical laughs as our improvisers battle monsters, solve puzzles, and desperately try to survive whatever wild curveballs you throw their way. Bring your best quest ideas, your loudest laugh, and maybe some bardic inspiration. Because in this adventure, the dice and you decide the story. Who are Improv Lore? We are Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, works towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops. You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.
full_content:
1600×900 160 KB

An Improvised Dungeons & Dragons Adventure – Live on Stage!

What happens when a group of brave (and slightly clueless) adventurers set out on a quest… and the dice, and YOU decide their fate?

This isn’t your usual D&D session. This is long-form improv meets chaotic fantasy:

The audience creates the world, from the tavern to the Big Bad Evil Guy.

Giant D20 rolls determine whether our heroes triumph or spectacularly fail.

Plot twists? You can throw them in anytime. (Yes, you can make the wizard speak only in rhymes if you want.)

Expect ridiculous characters, epic fails, and critical laughs as our improvisers battle monsters, solve puzzles, and desperately try to survive whatever wild curveballs you throw their way.

Bring your best quest ideas, your loudest laugh, and maybe some bardic inspiration. Because in this adventure, the dice and you decide the story.

Who are Improv Lore?

We are Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, works towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops.

You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.

title: Whimsical Wednesday: Friday Edition by Improv Lore
fancy title: Whimsical Wednesday: Friday Edition by Improv Lore
excerpt: Step into the playful heart of the marathon with our Whimsical Improv Jam, a curated event designed to allow you to try something new, play collaborative theatre games, and add some whimsy to your…
first_para: Step into the playful heart of the marathon with our Whimsical Improv Jam, a curated event designed to allow you to try something new, play collaborative theatre games, and add some whimsy to your weekend. Whether you’re completely new, a regular on stage, or somewhere in between, the Whimsical Jam is perfect for you. We’ll carefully guide you through a series of simple and engaging exercises, while you work in pairs and groups to make new discoveries. Drop in, bring a friend, or come solo and find your people here. *Our Whimsical Jam doesn’t have a stage or an audience; there is no performance in this segment. Who are Improv Lore? We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops. You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.
full_content:
1920×1080 554 KB

Step into the playful heart of the marathon with our Whimsical Improv Jam, a curated event designed to allow you to try something new, play collaborative theatre games, and add some whimsy to your weekend.

Whether you’re completely new, a regular on stage, or somewhere in between, the Whimsical Jam is perfect for you. We’ll carefully guide you through a series of simple and engaging exercises, while you work in pairs and groups to make new discoveries.

Drop in, bring a friend, or come solo and find your people here.

*Our Whimsical Jam doesn’t have a stage or an audience; there is no performance in this segment.

Who are Improv Lore?

We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops.

You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.

title: What is Yes, And: An Introduction to Improv by Improv Lore
fancy title: What is Yes, And: An Introduction to Improv by Improv Lore
excerpt: The Intro to Improv workshop is a gentle, structured way to understand how it all works. Across two hours, we’ll break down the basics of improv; how to approach spontaneity without overthinking it,…
first_para: The Intro to Improv workshop is a gentle, structured way to understand how it all works. Across two hours, we’ll break down the basics of improv; how to approach spontaneity without overthinking it, how to listen well, how to share control, and how simple ideas can grow into stories together. It’s less about performing and more about reacting and responding in the moment. If you’ve been curious but didn’t know where to begin, this is a good place to start. No pressure to be funny or quick - this is just safe space to learn, try, and build confidence at your own pace. Who are Improv Lore? We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops. You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.
full_content:
1600×900 286 KB

The Intro to Improv workshop is a gentle, structured way to understand how it all works.

Across two hours, we’ll break down the basics of improv; how to approach spontaneity without overthinking it, how to listen well, how to share control, and how simple ideas can grow into stories together. It’s less about performing and more about reacting and responding in the moment.

If you’ve been curious but didn’t know where to begin, this is a good place to start. No pressure to be funny or quick - this is just safe space to learn, try, and build confidence at your own pace.

Who are Improv Lore?

We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops.

You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.

title: Make an Improv Song: Musical Improv Jam by Improv Lore
fancy title: Make an Improv Song: Musical Improv Jam by Improv Lore
excerpt: This Musical Improv Jam is a space to ease into singing, rhythm, and making things up with a bit of melody. We’ll walk through the basics of finding a beat, building simple rhymes, spotting patterns,…
first_para: This Musical Improv Jam is a space to ease into singing, rhythm, and making things up with a bit of melody. We’ll walk through the basics of finding a beat, building simple rhymes, spotting patterns, and shaping a chorus or catchphrase you can come back to. We’ll do just enough to help you feel grounded and willing to try. Even if you think you can’t sing, come! This session is less about hitting the ‘right’ note and more about jumping in, listening, and letting the music carry you. By the end, you might surprise yourself with what you’re able to create on the spot. *Our Musical Improv Jam doesn’t have a stage or an audience; there is no performance in this segment. Who are Improv Lore? We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops. You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.
full_content:
111600×900 414 KB

This Musical Improv Jam is a space to ease into singing, rhythm, and making things up with a bit of melody.

We’ll walk through the basics of finding a beat, building simple rhymes, spotting patterns, and shaping a chorus or catchphrase you can come back to. We’ll do just enough to help you feel grounded and willing to try.

Even if you think you can’t sing, come! This session is less about hitting the ‘right’ note and more about jumping in, listening, and letting the music carry you. By the end, you might surprise yourself with what you’re able to create on the spot.

*Our Musical Improv Jam doesn’t have a stage or an audience; there is no performance in this segment.

Who are Improv Lore?

We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops.

You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.

title: PowerPoint Roulette by Improv Lore
excerpt: PowerPoint Roulette is a fast-paced, creative show where improvisers deliver presentations from slides they’ve never seen before. Each performer is faced with slides filled with bizarre graphs,…
first_para: PowerPoint Roulette is a fast-paced, creative show where improvisers deliver presentations from slides they’ve never seen before. Each performer is faced with slides filled with bizarre graphs, meaningless acronyms, and unexpected themes. With no time to prepare, they must improvise convincing explanations, facts, stories, and insights on the spot. Serious business pitches, heartfelt eulogies, hard-hitting TED talks, and fanciful conspiracy theories - prepare yourselves for a night ‘official’ fun! The audience gets to join the revelry by asking questions, creating a truly unpredictable night of improvised theatrics. Who are Improv Lore? We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops. You can follow us on Instagram at @improvlore and join our WhatsApp community.
full_content:
1600×900 104 KB

PowerPoint Roulette is a fast-paced, creative show where improvisers deliver presentations from slides they’ve never seen before. Each performer is faced with slides filled with bizarre graphs, meaningless acronyms, and unexpected themes. With no time to prepare, they must improvise convincing explanations, facts, stories, and insights on the spot.

Serious business pitches, heartfelt eulogies, hard-hitting TED talks, and fanciful conspiracy theories - prepare yourselves for a night ‘official’ fun! The audience gets to join the revelry by asking questions, creating a truly unpredictable night of improvised theatrics.

Who are Improv Lore?

We are a Bangalore-based community-theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling & unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful & whimsical. We meet on Wednesdays for Jams, and on weekends for workshops.
